problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Combining Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
